name: plugin.audio.audiobookshelf
description: Tooling configuration for the plugin.audio.audiobookshelf repository

scripts.lint:python: sh -c 'files=$(find . -path "./.git" -prune -o -path "./node_modules" -prune -o -path "./dist" -prune -o -path "*/__pycache__/*" -prune -o -name "*.py" -print); if [ -n "$files" ]; then python3 -m py_compile $files; else echo "No Python files to validate"; fi'
scripts.validate: npm run lint:python && npm run lint:xml && npm run build
